title: SimpleJoinMessage
body:
# SimpleJoinMessage
### plugin
Its just a basic and simple Plugin that sends a customizable message when joining the server.
This is my first Plugin so please message me on discord if you find any bugs/problems discord:blizzard8562


**You can edit the Message in _conifg.yml_**

_default:_
```
welcome-message: "Hello %player%! Enjoy your stay on our server!"
```

Have fun :)
